generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense? While some argue that our commitments are too costly, the reality is that our alliances are the cornerstone of global stability. By maintaining our commitments, we not only ensure our own security but also foster a more peaceful world. Let's not forget the lessons of history—isolationism has never been the answer. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
